# RuleRom Philo: Philosophy of Deterministic Approach 🧭

**Code + Meaning + Verification = Documentation**

## 📚 Documentation

| Language | URL |
|----------|-----|
| 🇷🇺 Russian | https://philo.rulerom.com/ru/ |
| 🇬🇧 English | https://philo.rulerom.com/en/ |
| 🇨🇳 Chinese | https://philo.rulerom.com/zh/ |

## 🔑 Three Principles

```
1. Input is finite. Inner world — infinite.
   (8 strings × 0..15 — enough to perceive the world)

2. Substrate is secondary. Personality — primary.
   (One D8P runs on CPU, GPU, FPGA, ASIC — result is identical)

3. Pain is not punishment. Pain — gradient.
   (Suffering = gradient: error → direction → growth)
```

## 📖 Sections

| Section | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| **🧱 Foundation** | Personality is not magic, but architecture |
| **💎 Architecture** | Determinism as ethics. Relay instead of router |
| **🌍 Context** | Earth as training phase. Vonnegut. Dependency as bug |
| **🏠 Nomos** | How to manage complexity without losing sovereignty |
| **💎 Ecosystem** | How rulerom projects connect into a single swarm |

## 📋 Core Documents

| Document | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| **Personality** | Pattern, not magic. D8P file with weights, thresholds, topology |
| **Determinism** | Ethics in code. Same input = same output. Always. |
| **Relay** | Locality scales. Global connectivity creates chaos |
| **Father & Bus** | Control vs Data. Access separated from content |
| **Earth as Training** | Theodicy in architecture. Suffering = gradient |
| **Digitizing Mastery** | Vonnegut's warning. Amplify, not replace |
| **Addiction & Love** | Architecture of drives. Memristors in saturation |
